song.title: Thou Magnet of My Soul
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Thou Magnet of my soul! Let me come nearer, till The life of self pulsates no more, But is forever still.
[V2] 2) Thou Sunshine of my heart! Fill Thou each crevice there, And let Thy garden yield to Thee A fragrance sweet and rare.
[V3] 3) Thou Ransomer from death! Possess Thy ransomed one: Appropriate to Thine own use The spoil that Thou hast won.
[V4] 4) Thou Lord of Life and Light! I bow beneath Thy sway, And count it holy privilege Thy precepts to obey.
[V5] 5) Thou Gift unspeakable! Straight from God’s heart of love; I break my heart to give Thee room And thus Thy sweetness prove.
song.author: Margaret E. Barber
